title: Identity Ledger Record
description: Canonical person record for Ring 1 identity service. JSONL format; one record per unique identity. Canonical key is UUID v5 derived from primary email address via Uuid::new_v5(&Uuid::NAMESPACE_DNS, email.as_bytes()).

identity_id.description: UUIDv5 derived from primary email (canonical identity key). Deterministic and reproducible across all nodes.

primary_email.description: Primary email address used to derive the identity_id. Ring 1 zero-AI rule: email extraction via regex only (per ADR-07).

addresses.description: Multi-endpoint communication channels. Each channel is optional but must include type validation if present.

emails.description: All known email addresses for this identity, including primary. Deduplicated lowercase.

phones.description: Phone numbers in E.164 format (if known). Extract via regex; no parsing or normalization (Ring 1 zero-AI).

endpoints.description: Other communication endpoints (Slack, Teams, Signal, etc.). Free-form URL or handle.

roles.description: Role and relationship attributes. Each role is a snapshot at a point in time; append-only update log lives in role-claims ledger (future).

role_id.description: UUIDv4 for this role assignment (unique within this identity's role history)

organization.description: Organization name (PointSav, Woodfine, external partner, etc.)

effective_at.description: When this role became effective (RFC 3339 timestamp)

attributes.description: Role-specific attributes (title, department, permissions, etc.). Free-form; clients may ignore unknown keys.

canonical_name.description: Human-readable canonical name. Extracted from email display name or user profile; may be null if unknown.

metadata.description: Ring 1 service metadata (not for customer consumption).

source_id.description: Source system or document that first provided this identity (e.g., 'sovereign-acs-engine', 'user-import-batch-20260425')

verification_level.description: Confidence level in this record's canonical status

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this identity record was first created

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this identity record was last modified
